positive: Stylized vector illustration of a majestic astronaut floating in deep space, rendered with bold, clean lines and limited color palette (deep blues, cosmic purples, bright cyan accents, and stark white). The astronaut is looking towards a stylized, crystalline Saturn-like ringed planet. The composition should be perfectly symmetrical and centered, suitable for a repeat pattern or single chest print. Emphasize the contrast between the deep black void of space and the illuminated subject matter. Geometric, retro-futuristic aesthetic, highly graphic, minimal shading, designed for t-shirt printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low quality, poor composition, bad anatomy, extra limbs, muted colors, photography, realism, messy, grunge
